allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.Id -in @\(18872, 16880\)} | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Killed $_" })
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ | Select-Object Id, ProcessName })
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'python|uvicorn' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path)
